Same performance. Small quirks. Lower impact.

As part of our sustainability promise, we offer a very limited number of Woxna saws with minor cosmetic quirks. These are fully functional tools, built with the same blade quality, locking precision, and ergonomic design you’d expect from any Woxna saw.

The quirks might include:

– Unusual color for the wood (especially light colors of walnut)
– Mismatched handle tones between left and right handle-half 
– Wood grain irregularities or scrapes on the blade 

These saws are perfect for those who value performance and sustainability over perfection. Functionally flawless, mechanically identical, just with a bit more character.

Quantities are extremely limited and change over time. Please note that the quirked batch is sent out in our old product packaging, if you really want the new please send us an e-mail after your order has been placed. 

To learn more about each saw model, visit their respective product pages.

Designed to last & made to be repaired 

Our ambition is for Woxna saws to be used, loved, and taken care of for as long as possible. That’s why we build them to endure and to be repairable.

If your blade starts to feel dull or the locking mechanism isn’t as firm as it once was, don’t throw away your saw. 

Restore your Woxna saw to its original precision

Each Woxna spare parts kit includes everything you need to bring your saw back to peak condition:
– A brand-new sawblade
– A replacement middle brick (which is a part of the locking mechanism)
– New screws
– Two Torx keys for simple assembly

With this kit, and a touch of oil on your wooden handles, your Woxna saw will feel just as smooth, sharp, and solid as the day you first used it. 

When mounting a new saw blade on your Woxna saw, we recommend using a small amount of threadlocker on the front screw, for example Loctite Blue No. 243.

Questions about compatibility or installation? Contact us anytime at hello@woxna.com

A well-maintained tool will last for decades. To ensure a long service life of your Woxna saw, we recommend regular care of both the wooden handle and the steel blade. Our care oils come in 100 ml (3.4 fl oz) cans and are based on a special refined linseed oil where the non-drying components have been removed to create a even better protection for wood and steel. These oils are environmentally friendly and locally produced in Sweden. 

Safety note: Oil-soaked cloths may self-ignite. Allow cloths to dry fully in an open, safe place, or store them in water before disposal.
